creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 211030
Change tk-dep of german/ding

german/ding is one of the rare cases, who uses x11-toolkits/tk85 instead of x11-toolkits/tk86 on my boxes. Since ding seems to work fine with 8.6, there is no reason not to update.

While here, I also added new runtime dependencies for textproc/dict and textproc/hunspell and made some changes to pkg-descr.


Tested with Poudriere (HEADa/i, 12.1a/i, 11.3a/i). 'portlint -AC' seems to be happy.
